reviews.comment:
Un descanso y un respiro muy linda atención !!

(Translated by Google)
A wonderful break and a great respite!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyLWRHTlBREAE

reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación frente al lago llena de rosales todo muy limpio y personal muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful lakeside resort filled with rose bushes, everything very clean and the staff very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybWVDa2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Decir que está ubicado frente al lago nauel Huapi es todo es la estación para descansar hacer una parada de descanso y cargar combustible para seguir más arriba ya que el ascenso en los autos consume un 30 %mas sin que se den cuenta así que es un lugar extrategico para carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
To say it's located opposite Lake Nauel Huapi is an understatement; it's the perfect station to rest, take a break, and refuel before continuing further up the mountain. The ascent in cars consumes 30% more fuel without drivers noticing, making it a strategic location for refueling.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyMXFQYXd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio chiquita, de campo. Cargué NAFTA. La tarjeta de crédito pasó bien. Compré unos sandwiches que hizo la señora que atiende, Maravillosos! Eran de pollo con morrón, apio y un poquito de mayonesa. Elegí pan multicereal con semillas. Súper ricos y delicados

(Translated by Google)
Small, rural gas station. I loaded up on NAFTA. The credit card went through. I bought some sandwiches the lady at the counter made. Wonderful! They were chicken with bell peppers, celery, and a little mayonnaise. I chose multigrain bread with seeds. Super delicious and delicate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNnJEbXVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion. El playero muy amable y la atencion del shop estupenda. Las empanadas de carne super recomendables!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The attendant was very friendly and the shop staff were fantastic. The meat empanadas are highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycXBqMlN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Pocas opciones de comida

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Limited food options.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Hector. Debemos adaptar la oferta a la demanda mayoritaria en estos tiempos.

reviews.comment:
Después de llenar el tanque necesitábamos dos vasos descartables, se los pedí al sr. quiosquero (no tenía tapaboca) y no me quiso dar salvo que me llevara una bebida. Le dije que me los de y me los cobre. Me volvió a repetir la misma inefable respuesta. Pésimo servicio

(Translated by Google)
After filling up the tank, we needed two disposable cups. I asked the kiosk owner (who wasn't wearing a mask) for them, but he refused unless I bought a drink. I told him to give them to me and charge me for them. He repeated the same unhelpful response. Terrible service.

reviewReply.comment: Bueno no coincide con lo expresado por el quiosquero, de todos modos le pedimos disculpa por el mal rato que puede haber pasado.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXc2NLM1hBEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene wifi gratis,los baños limpios aunq no tiene para cargar agua caliente

(Translated by Google)
It has free Wi-Fi, the bathrooms are clean although there's no hot water dispenser

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Pam. El agua caliente se pide en la tienda, aún no tenemos la máquina expendedora, pero está pedida.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXa1lzeRAB
